tagline: Your One-Stop Shop for All Areas of Landscaping

hero.headline:
23 Years Transforming Arizona
Landscapes
hero.subheadline: Your property deserves more than mowing and trimming. From landscape design and smart irrigation to pool construction and tree service, Greenscapes delivers it all under one roof. One call, one team, one standard of excellence.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Landscape & Pool Care<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: Stop juggling multiple contractors for your property. Greenscapes handles landscaping, trees, pools, and irrigation — all from one trusted, family-owned team with 23 years of experience.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Installation
cards.description: Full-service design and build including hardscapes, pavers, fire pits, water features, artificial turf, and landscape lighting. We bring your outdoor vision to life.

cards.title: Commercial Property Maintenance
cards.description: Turf, shrub, and tree care with fertilization, weed control, pest management, and irrigation monitoring. Trusted by apartment complexes across Maricopa County.

cards.title: Pool Design & Construction
cards.description: Custom swimming pool design, construction, and repair through our sister company Pool Hub, LLC. From concept to first splash.

cards.title: Smart Irrigation Systems
cards.description: Weathermatic Premier Partner delivering EPA WaterSense-certified smart controllers. Average 38% water savings on every property we equip.

cards.title: Tree Service
cards.description: Commercial and residential tree removal, trimming, and fertilization through our sister company Turning Leaf, LLC. Safe, efficient, and fully insured.

cards.title: Hardscape & Outdoor Living
cards.description: Custom BBQs, outdoor fireplaces, block work, stucco, mailboxes, and paver installations. Create the outdoor living space your property deserves.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Beautiful Property

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Tell us about your property. We'll visit, assess your needs, and provide an honest, detailed proposal within 48 hours. No pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Execute
steps.description: Our experienced crews handle everything — design, installation, and ongoing maintenance. Licensed, bonded, insured, and backed by 23 years of local expertise.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Property
steps.description: Your landscape stays pristine, your pool sparkles, and your water bills drop. One team, one call, total peace of mind for your property.

about.label: Why Property Managers Trust Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, Community-Rooted, Built to Last
about.description: Since 2003, the Greenscapes family has served apartment complexes and multi-housing communities across the greater Phoenix area. What started as a landscape maintenance company has grown into a full-service provider with sister companies for tree care and pool services. We are BBB Accredited with an A+ rating, a Weathermatic Premier Partner, and members of the Arizona Multihousing Association and ALCA.

features.title: Licensed, Bonded & Insured
features.description: Full licensing, bonding, and insurance coverage on every project. Your property and our crew are always protected.

features.title: One Team for Everything
features.description: Landscape, trees, pools, and irrigation — all managed by one company. No more juggling vendors or chasing contractors.

features.title: 38% Average Water Savings
features.description: Our Weathermatic smart irrigation systems are EPA WaterSense certified, cutting your water costs significantly while keeping landscapes green.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every property is unique. Contact us for a custom proposal tailored to your needs — no hidden fees, no pressure.

guarantee.headline: Our "Property Pride" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we will return to make it right at no additional charge. We have built our reputation over 23 years on trust — and we plan to keep it that way.

faqs.question: Do you work with apartment complexes and HOAs?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Multi-housing communities and apartment complexes are our specialty. We have been serving them since 2003 and understand the unique demands of commercial property maintenance, from common-area landscaping to pool upkeep.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Glendale, Phoenix, and the entire Maricopa County area. Whether your property is in the East Valley, West Valley, or central Phoenix, our crews are ready to help.

faqs.question: Can you handle both landscaping and pool services?
faqs.answer: Yes — that is what makes us unique. Through our sister companies Turning Leaf, LLC and Pool Hub, LLC, we offer landscape maintenance, tree service, pool design and construction, and smart irrigation all under one umbrella.

faqs.question: How do your smart irrigation systems save water?
faqs.answer: We are a Weathermatic Premier Partner. Their smart controllers are EPA WaterSense certified and adjust watering based on real-time weather data. On average, our clients see 38% water savings compared to traditional systems.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Greenscapes Landcare is fully licensed, bonded, and insured. We are also BBB Accredited with an A+ rating since 2011 and certified members of the Arizona Landscape Contractors Association (ALCA).

testimonials.name: Mike M.
testimonials.text: The complete landscaping redesign was outstanding. Design Manager Mike Navarro was incredibly responsive, and crew supervisor Jesus was always available and knowledgeable throughout the entire project.

testimonials.name: Rachelle R.
testimonials.text: What I appreciate most about Greenscapes is how open they are to receiving feedback and supporting their customers with any questions. They genuinely care about the properties they maintain.

testimonials.name: Property Manager
testimonials.text: We have been using Greenscapes at our communities for over 12 years and are happy with their landscaping services. Consistent, professional, and always responsive. Highly recommend them.

Your Property?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation property assessment within 48 hours. One team for landscaping, pools, trees, and irrigation — serving all of Maricopa County.
